notes: release_version v1.1 is an internal release-freeze label maintained at documentation level
release_date and generated_at record the current polish pass rather than a retriever rebuild time
kb_version medical_kb_v1 is grounded by ai_lab/datasets/medical_kb_v1.json
chunk_version kb_chunks_v1 is grounded by the current chunk file name
embedding_version is set to null because no explicit embedding artifact version string was found beyond model/config metadata
policy_version response_policy_v1 is grounded by ai_lab/docs/response_policy_v1.md
policy_decision_basis_top_k is grounded by the policy document statement that top-3 retrieval is the basis for answer decisions
supported_topics are conservative high-level labels derived from current chunk source groups and policy scope, not from an explicit topic enum file
patient_facing_only is null because the repository does not provide a strong explicit flag for that property
this manifest does not claim that every runtime path currently uses faiss.index directly
compatibility_notes: intended as the stable comparison point for later KB expansion and retriever improvement
compatible with artifact sets under ai_lab/artifacts/retriever_v1
compatible with top-3 policy assumptions described in response_policy_v1.md
if backend integration reads only kb_chunks_v1.json and chunk_metadata.json, this should be documented as an implementation-layer simplification rather than a change in frozen baseline assets
